name: Sullivan's Island Lighthouse Meeting
notes: Beginning April 12, 2026 we will meet on the beach by the lighthouse at Station 18.5. Bring a towel or chair. Please park per beach rules (tires off pavement and cars facing direction of traffic) If the weather is below 60 degrees or raining, meet in the gym of the Baptist Church. 1753 Central Ave, Sullivan's Island, SC 29482.

name: SOB Men's
notes:
Park on Meeting St., Broad St., or Church St. There is no dedicated parking for this meeting.
Please do not use any entrances on St. Michael’s Alley—those are private residences. Do not knock on the door on St. Michael's Alley. The entrance to the meeting is located on the opposite side of the building, under a metal awning with a red door next to a planter box.
